title: Reworked Death
description: Brings back the infamous Deathbound enchantment and extends death drop despawn time!
body:
**Reworked Death** is a lightweight survival-focused mod that introduces the treasure-only Deathbound enchantment, allowing you to retain a single item after death at the cost of durability, and drastically increases the despawn time of dropped items from 5 minutes to 6 in-game hours, giving players a real chance to recover their gear.

 

## **Features**

**Deathbound Enchantment**

*   Rare treasure enchantment (levels I–III, not enchantable at the table)
*   Automatically keeps the enchanted item in your inventory after death
*   After death, it has a chance to lose 1 level depending on its current strength (50% at level I, 33% at level II, 25% at level III); if level I is lost, the enchantment is removed entirely
*   The item also loses 25–50% of its remaining durability (if you want to re-enchant your gear indefinitely, I recommend installing the [Anvil Never Too Expensive](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/anvil-never-too-expensive) mod)
*   Compatible with tools and armor, and also with the recovery compass
*   Can be found in structure chests, via fishing, and through librarian trades (Novice to Expert)

**Death Drops Despawn Slower**

*   All items dropped on death remain on the ground for **6 in-game hours** instead of 5 minutes
*   The despawn timer still pauses if the chunk is unloaded (vanilla behavior preserved)
